title: KyverEco
description: The best free modern and lightweight economy plugin
body:
# 💸 NexusEco
**Economy done right** – A modern, lightweight, and fully configurable Minecraft economy plugin.

---

## ❓ What is NexusEco?

**NexusEco** is a **free**, **modern**, and **lightweight** economy plugin built to deliver **high performance**, a **simple setup**, and **full control** for server owners.

---

## ⚡ Optimized for Speed

Built for performance, NexusEco uses minimal resources while providing a seamless experience.

---

## 🗃️ Flexible Storage

Supports **MySQL**, **SQLite**, and **MongoDB** utilizing **HikariCP**, out of the box.

---

## 🛠️ Easy to Configure

Get started in minutes with **clean**, **beginner-friendly** config files.

---

## 📑 Transaction History

Whenever a **transaction** is made, it's saved into the sender and receiver's **transaction history**, which can be viewed with the `/history` command.

Example:
- **Type:** Admin Received  
- **From:** You  
- **To:** You  
- **Amount:** 500  
- **Date:** 03/05/2025 14:22  
- **ID:** `#B47DDA8695`

---

## 🏆 Balance Leaderboards

View the top player balances on your server in a **paginated GUI** using the `/baltop` command.

Example:
- **Rank:** 1  
- **Name:** Harfull  
- **Balance:** $600  
- *Click to view profile*

---

## ⚙️ Fully Configurable

All **messages**, **GUIs**, and other aspects of the plugin are highly **customizable** to fit your server’s needs.

---

## 🧾 Commands

A detailed list of all the **commands** that NexusEco offers:

```
/balance <player>          - nexuseco.balance  
/pay <player>              - nexuseco.pay  
/history                   - nexuseco.history  
/baltop                    - nexuseco.baltop  
/profile <player>          - nexuseco.profile  

/economy                   - nexuseco.economy  
/nexuseco reload           - nexuseco.admin  
/nexuseco version          - nexuseco.admin  
```

Example command config (`config.yml`):
```yaml
commands:
  balance:
    enabled: true
    aliases:
      - bal
    permission: nexuseco.balance

  pay:
    enabled: true
    aliases:
      - transfer
    permission: nexuseco.pay
```

---

## 🎁 Placeholders

A list of all the **placeholders** NexusEco supports:

- `%nexuseco_balance%` – Displays the raw balance of the player  
- `%nexuseco_formatted_balance%` – Displays the formatted balance of the player

These can be used anywhere PlaceholderAPI is supported.

---

## 🧩 Dependencies

NexusEco requires [Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/) for smooth server-wide **economy** integration.  
It also supports [PlaceholderAPI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245/) to show your **placeholders** in messages, scoreboards, and GUIs.

---

🟣 Try NexusEco today and make your economy system lightweight, modern, and powerful — without compromising on speed or customization!
